description.en: Complete guide to threaded rod selection and applications. Learn about fully threaded rod, partial thread, materials, grades, and common uses in construction and industrial applications.
description.zh: 螺柱选型和应用完整指南。了解全螺纹螺柱、部分螺纹、材料、等级以及建筑和工业应用中的常见用途。
description.es: Guía completa de selección y aplicaciones de varillas roscadas. Aprenda sobre varillas totalmente roscadas, rosca parcial, materiales, grados y usos comunes.
description.ar: دليل شامل لاختيار وتطبيقات القضبان الملولبة. تعلم عن القضبان ذات الخيط الكامل والخيط الجزئي والمواد والدرجات والاستخدامات الشائعة.
description.fr: Guide complet de sélection et applications des tiges filetées. Apprenez les tiges entièrement filetées, filetage partiel, matériaux, grades et usages courants.
description.pt: Guia completo de seleção e aplicações de barras roscadas. Aprenda sobre barra totalmente rosqueada, rosca parcial, materiais, graus e usos comuns.
description.ru: Полное руководство по выбору и применению резьбовых шпилек. Узнайте о полностью резьбовых шпильках, частичной резьбе, материалах, марках и распространенных областях применения.
description.ja: ねじ棒の選定と応用の完全ガイド。全ねじ棒、片側ねじ、材料、グレード、一般的な用途について学びます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden zur Auswahl und Anwendung von Gewindestangen. Erfahren Sie mehr über vollgewinde, teilgewinde, Materialien, Klassen und gängige Anwendungen.
description.hi: थ्रेडेड रॉड चयन और अनुप्रयोगों की पूर्ण गाइड। पूर्ण थ्रेडेड रॉड, आंशिक थ्रेड, सामग्री, ग्रेड, और निर्माण और औद्योगिक अनुप्रयोगों में सामान्य उपयोग के बारे में जानें।

keywords: threaded rod, all-thread rod, fully threaded rod, threaded bar, stud bolt

body.en:
Threaded rod (also called all-thread, stud bolt, or continuous thread) is a rod with threads running along its entire length:

Key characteristics:
- Available in diameters: M6 to M72 (metric) or 1/4" to 2-1/2" (imperial)
- Standard lengths: 1m, 2m, 3m (or 3ft, 6ft, 12ft)
- Can be cut to any desired length on-site
- Acts as a through fastener when used with nuts on both ends

Materials: Carbon steel, stainless steel (304, 316), alloy steel
Coatings: Plain, zinc plated, hot-dip galvanized, PTFE coated

TradeGo threaded rods are manufactured to DIN 975 (metric) standard with full thread configuration.

Threaded rod versatility makes it essential in many applications:

1. Structural Anchorage:
- Anchor rods embedded in concrete
- Connection between structural elements
- Tension rod in pre-stressed concrete

2. Hanging and Support:
- Suspended ceiling support rods
- Pipe and duct support
- HVAC equipment mounting

3. Adjustable Connections:
- Temporary structures
- jigs and fixtures
- Leveling applications

4. General Fastening:
- When combined with nuts and washers
- Custom-length bolts
- Repair and maintenance
